{#- Base shell: , header, footer, scripts. -#} {#- All pages extend this template and fill the {% block main %} placeholder. -#} {%- set head_extra = head_extra | default('') -%} {%- set body_class = body_class | default('') -%} {%- set footer_about = data.get('footer_about', site.footer.about) -%} {%- set footer_contact = data.get('footer_contact', site.footer.contact) -%} {#- Helper: produce a path relative to the current page -#} {{ data.title | safe_amp | safe }} Skip to content
{{ site.brand.name | safe_amp | safe }} {{ site.brand.tag | safe_amp | safe }}
{%- for item in site.nav %} {{ item.label | safe_amp | safe }} {%- endfor %}
{% block main %}{% endblock %}

{{ site.footer.about_heading | safe_amp | safe }}

{{ footer_about | safe_amp | safe }}

{{ site.footer.sections_heading | safe_amp | safe }}

    {%- for s in site.footer.sections %}
  • {{ s.label | safe_amp | safe }}
    • {%- endfor %}

{{ site.footer.contact_heading | safe_amp | safe }}

    {%- for c in footer_contact %}
  • {{ c.label | safe_amp | safe }}
    • {%- endfor %}
{{ site.footer.copyright | safe_amp | safe }} {{ site.footer.status | safe_amp | safe }}
